intel_overview.headline_en: UPC Rulings Tighten, FRAND Settlements Accelerate
intel_overview.summary_zh: 2026年上半年欧洲IP战场呈现司法高压与许可整合并行的态势。统一专利法院（UPC）通过多起撤销案确立严格审查标准，同时PMAC调解机制上线推动纠纷解决多元化。FRAND领域，诺基亚胜诉及Sisvel专利池扩容显示全球费率裁定成为主流，诉讼正快速转化为许可协议。此外，欧盟在商标声誉保护、在线版权报酬及基本权利合规方面强化监管，要求企业从单纯维权转向全面合规治理。
top_signals: UPC米兰与巴黎分部连续撤销高价值专利，显示法院对有效性审查趋于严格
Nokia在英国胜诉并达成全球RAND费率，促使跨国SEP诉讼大规模撤回
Sisvel等专利池管理员变更及华硕加入Wi-Fi池，标志SEP纠纷向池化许可转型
CJEU裁定成员国可强制规定在线新闻公平报酬，重塑数字内容版权生态
cross_currents: 司法效率与质量双升：UPC案件管理系统优化与EPO质量仪表盘数据向好，表明欧洲IP行政与司法体系进入高效透明新阶段
合规边界扩展：从传统IP侵权延伸至GDPR、反歧视及ESG设计价值，欧盟将基本权利宪章深度嵌入商业运营审查
许可模式重构：单一法域禁令威慑力增强（如五国禁令），迫使被诉方放弃对抗，转向接受专利池或全球费率裁定
implications: 应对UPC高风险：鉴于UPC撤销专利的严厉性，中国企业需前置进行更严格的FTO分析，并善用PMAC调解降低诉讼成本
调整SEP策略：面对全球费率裁定趋势，应评估加入主流专利池的成本效益，避免在多法域陷入被动消耗战
强化内容合规：出海数字平台需提前布局新闻出版者报酬合规机制，并审查营销素材以符合欧盟非歧视及价值观底线
watchlist: 摩尔多瓦加入EPO后（2026年6月生效）的具体申请流程与费用变化
瑞士新《专利法》下实质审查制度的具体实施细节及对申请成本的影响
EUIPO针对AI生成内容及在线执法纠纷即将出台的新规或指导方针

daily_report.headline_zh: UPC年报发布，EPO收紧技术认定
daily_report.headline_en: UPC Annual Review, EPO Tech Ruling, CJEU SPC Referral, UK Online Sales Guidance
daily_report.executive_line: 本周UPC发布2025年报并推进调解机制，EPO裁定注册启用属非技术特征，CJEU受理前药SPC案，英国法院明确在线分销限制合规边界。
daily_report.summary_zh: 欧洲IP生态呈现规则细化与执法趋严态势。UPC通过年度回顾展示运营成熟度并强化ADR功能；EPO在创造性评估中进一步剥离纯商业逻辑，提高专利授权门槛；CJEU介入前药SPC资格争议，将重塑药品保护策略。同时，英国上诉法院为选择性分销体系提供在线销售指引，德国警示AI驱动的恶意商标抢注风险。企业需同步调整专利撰写、SEP许可及品牌防御策略以应对合规挑战。

storylines.why_it_matters_en: The report provides data-driven insights into litigation timelines and court capacity, while the new mediation framework offers confidential alternatives to public litigation for resolving disputes.

storylines.title_en: CJEU Reviews Pro-Drug SPC Eligibility And Copyright Fee Abuse
storylines.what_happened_en: The CJEU accepted a referral on whether pro-drugs qualify for independent SPC protection and ruled that flat-rate copyright fees ignoring occupancy may abuse market dominance.
storylines.why_it_matters_en: The SPC referral clarifies protection scope for derivative pharmaceuticals, while the copyright ruling provides licensees with antitrust grounds to challenge disproportionate royalty structures.

storylines.what_happened_en: The UK Court of Appeal overturned a lower court ruling, holding that restricting authorized retailers from selling on unbranded discount websites does not inherently breach competition law.
storylines.why_it_matters_en: This judgment offers luxury and premium brands clear antitrust compliance guidance, allowing reasonable online channel controls to protect brand image without automatic illegality findings.

report_items.title_zh: UPC官方2025年度回顾：五大亮点解析
report_items.title_en: UPC Annual Review 2025: Five Key Highlights from the Court's Second Official Report
report_items.title: Official UPC Year in Review – Five highlights from 2025
report_items.summary_zh: Bristows律所发布分析，解读统一专利法院（UPC）发布的2025年官方年度回顾报告。该报告是UPC的第二份年度报告，全面梳理了2025年的机构活动、案件趋势及运营发展。文章从中提炼出五个对UPC用户至关重要的亮点，旨在帮助利益相关者更好地理解UPC的最新动态与司法实践走向，为在欧专利诉讼策略提供参考依据。
report_items.summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) has published its second official Annual Review, detailing institutional activity, case trends, and operational developments throughout 2025. Bristows analyzes this report, extracting five specific highlights deemed most relevant for UPC users. This overview provides essential context on the court's evolving practices and statistical performance during its second full year of operation.
core_points_zh: UPC发布第二份官方年度回顾，全面展示2025年机构活动与案件趋势
报告详细分析了UPC的运营发展状况，为法律从业者提供关键数据支持
文章提炼五大核心亮点，聚焦对UPC用户最具参考价值的实务动态
core_points_en: The UPC released its second Annual Review, offering a comprehensive statistical and operational overview of the court's activities in 2025.
Bristows identifies five key highlights from the report that provide critical insights into current case trends and procedural developments.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This annual review serves as a primary reference for understanding the UPC's operational trajectory and judicial tendencies. Rights holders and legal teams should examine these highlights to align their European patent enforcement expectations with the court's actual caseload management and procedural evolution.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: The report offers data-driven insights into UPC activity levels, helping rights holders contextualize litigation timelines and court capacity.
Practice note: Legal practitioners should review the identified highlights to stay updated on emerging procedural norms and case management trends within the UPC.
What to monitor: Future updates to the UPC's annual reporting will likely continue to shape expectations regarding case volume distribution and operational efficiency.

report_items.title_zh: EPO裁定：基于注册的启用属于非技术特征
report_items.title_en: EPO Board: Registration-Based Device Enablement Is Non-Technical
report_items.title: Registration-based Enablement: Non-technical
report_items.summary_zh: 本案涉及菲利普莫里斯电热吸烟系统专利的异议程序。上诉委员会认定，设备需经互联网主机注册后方可启用的特征（特征1.7），仅反映非技术的商业或行政要求，不贡献于发明的技术特性。即便该要求导致设备运行状态发生物质变化，其底层概念的非技术性质不变。此裁决明确了在评估创造性时，纯粹由商业规则驱动的功能性限制将被排除在技术贡献之外。
report_items.summary_en: In decision T 1745/23, EPO Technical Board of Appeal 3.5.01 addressed an electrically heated smoking system by Philip Morris. The claimed invention required the device to be enabled only after registration via an Internet application on a host. The Board determined that this registration-based enablement feature constitutes a non-technical business or administrative constraint. Consequently, it does not contribute to the technical character of the invention. The Board clarified that even if implementing such a requirement causes a material change in the device’s operational state, the underlyi...
core_points_zh: 注册后启用被视为非技术商业约束，不赋予发明技术特性
实施商业规则导致的设备状态改变不改变其非技术本质
在评估创造性时，纯商业或行政要求不被视为对技术的贡献
core_points_en: Registration-based enablement is classified as a non-technical business or administrative constraint.
Material changes in device operational state do not confer technical character on administrative requirements.
Purely commercial rules driving functional limitations are excluded from technical contribution assessments.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请IoT及智能硬件专利时，应避免将单纯的商业逻辑（如付费解锁、注册激活）作为核心技术特征。撰写时需深入挖掘实现这些功能背后的具体技术改进（如通信协议优化、安全加密算法），确保权利要求聚焦于解决技术问题，以防因缺乏技术贡献而在异议或无效程序中被驳回。
report_items.insight_en: This decision reinforces the EPO's strict separation between technical features and non-technical business methods under the problem-solution approach. For IoT and smart hardware applicants, linking device functionality to administrative protocols like user registration will not support inventive step arguments. Drafting strategies must focus on specific technical implementations, such as communication protocols or s...
insight_points_zh: 避免将纯商业逻辑作为核心技术创新点申报欧洲专利
聚焦实现功能的具体技术改进以确立专利的技术贡献
insight_points_en: Client relevance: IoT and smart hardware rights holders must distinguish technical solutions from administrative access controls to secure patent protection in Europe.
Practice note: Claims should focus on specific technical improvements, such as data encryption or protocol optimization, rather than registration-based activation logic.
What to monitor: Future Board decisions applying this principle to other connected devices where software updates or user authentication drive operational states.

report_items.title_zh: CJEU裁决请求：前药是否可独立获SPC保护？
report_items.title_en: CJEU Asked to Rule on SPC Eligibility for Pro-Drugs of Previously Approved Active Ingredients
report_items.title: Pro = Active? CJEU Asked To Decide
report_items.summary_zh: 爱尔兰律所HGF分析指出，CJEU已受理案件（C-794/25），需裁定已获批活性成分的前药能否独立获得补充保护证书（SPC）。背景涉及武田制药的LDX（右旋安非他命前药）与母药DEX。尽管LDX作为新活性物质获批上市，但法规对前药是否属“同一活性物质”存疑。此裁决将澄清行业争议，解决相关诉讼，明确前药在欧盟的SPC资格标准。
report_items.summary_en: The Court of Justice of the European Union (CJEU) has received a new referral (Case C-794/25) regarding whether an approved pro-drug of a previously authorized active pharmaceutical ingredient qualifies for independent Supplementary Protection Certificate (SPC) protection. The case centers on lisdexamfetamine (LDX), a pro-drug of dexamphetamine (DEX). Although LDX was granted marketing authorization as a New Active Substance due to significant differences in safety and efficacy profiles, questions remain under Article 10.2.b of the Medicinal Products Directive. The CJEU’s ruling aims to resolv...
core_points_zh: CJEU受理前药SPC资格案，需裁定前药能否独立于母药获保护
争议焦点在于前药是否因安全性或疗效显著不同而视为新活性物质
裁决结果将消除法律不确定性，直接影响欧盟药品专利策略布局
core_points_en: The CJEU must determine if a pro-drug with distinct safety or efficacy properties can secure an SPC independently from its parent active substance.
Article 10.2.b of the Medicinal Products Directive treats derivatives as the same active substance unless they differ significantly in safety or efficacy.
The outcome will clarify SPC eligibility standards for pro-drugs like lisdexamfetamine, impacting portfolio strategies for modified pharmaceutical compounds.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This referral addresses critical uncertainty in EU pharmaceutical IP law regarding the intersection of regulatory approval status and SPC entitlement. For rights holders, the distinction between a 'New Active Substance' for regulatory purposes and an 'active ingredient' for SPC purposes is pivotal. A negative ruling could restrict SPC availability for improved formulations of older drugs, while a positive one would s...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders must evaluate whether their pro-drug portfolios rely on independent SPC protection or are vulnerable to being classified as the same active substa…
Practice note: When preparing SPC applications for derivatives, ensure robust documentation of significant differences in safety and efficacy to support arguments for distinct act…
What to monitor: Monitor the CJEU's final judgment in Case C-794/25 for definitive guidance on interpreting Article 10.2.b of the Medicinal Products Directive in the context of SP…

report_items.title_zh: 德国商标申请中的恶意注册：企业日益增长的风险
report_items.title_en: German Bad Faith Trademark Filings: DPMA Warns of Rising Strategic Abuse Risks
report_items.title: Bösgläubigkeit (bad faith) in trademark filings: A growing risk for businesses
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析德国商标法中“恶意”（Bösgläubigkeit）概念的应用与风险。德国专利商标局指出，自2025年中以来，针对未注册商标的恶意申请激增，常利用AI工具识别目标并通过电商平台施压。依据《德国商标法》，缺乏真实使用意图且旨在阻碍竞争或获取不当利益的申请将被驳回或宣告无效。该认定需综合评估申请人主观意图与客观情况，受欧盟判例影响显著。
report_items.summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) has highlighted a significant increase in potentially bad-faith trademark applications since mid-2025. These filings often target signs already used by third parties without formal protection, aiming to exert competitive pressure rather than indicate commercial origin. The DPMA attributes this trend to technological developments, such as AI tools facilitating the identification of unregistered signs, and online marketplace enforcement mechanisms that allow swift blocking of third parties. Under the German Trademark Act (MarkenG), applications file...
core_points_zh: 德国专利商标局警示恶意商标申请激增，多利用AI识别未注册标志进行策略性阻击
德国商标法规定，无真实使用意图且旨在滥用权利的注册可被驳回或在事后宣告无效
恶意认定需结合主观意图与客观环境综合评估，德国司法实践深受欧盟法院判例影响
core_points_en: DPMA reports a surge in bad-faith filings targeting unregistered signs used by third parties for strategic leverage.
AI tools and online marketplace enforcement mechanisms facilitate rapid identification and blocking of competitors.
German law excludes registration or allows invalidation of marks filed without genuine intent to use.
report_items.insight_zh: 对在欧中国企业而言，应尽早完成核心品牌在德注册以确立权利基础，避免被抢注。同时需建立主动监控机制，警惕竞争对手利用恶意注册通过电商平台快速下架产品。面对此类指控，应积极收集在先使用证据，援引德国商标法关于恶意的规定提起无效宣告请求，维护市场地位。
report_items.insight_en: This development underscores the increasing scrutiny of applicant intent in German practice, aligning with broader EU trends. Rights holders must recognize that mere registration is no longer an absolute shield against challenges based on bad faith. Proactive portfolio management is essential to mitigate risks associated with strategic filings designed to disrupt market access or extract undue advantages through enfo...
insight_points_zh: 尽早完成德国商标注册并建立监控机制，防范恶意抢注带来的电商下架风险
遭遇恶意指控时，应积极收集在先使用证据，依法提起无效宣告以维权
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Early registration remains critical to secure rights, but businesses must also prepare defenses against bad-faith challenges.
Practice note: Monitor new filings closely to identify potential bad-faith applications targeting existing unregistered signs.
What to monitor: Watch for DPMA guidance and Federal Court of Justice case law refining the definition of bad faith in digital contexts.

report_items.summary_zh: 英国上诉法院在Deckers诉Up & Running案中裁定，品牌方禁止授权零售商在未品牌折扣网站销售不违反竞争法，推翻竞争上诉法庭原判。法院确认此类在线限制需结合法律与经济背景评估损害程度，而非自动违法。此举虽未放松对转售价格维持等核心限制的执法，但强调品牌应建立透明、客观的分销标准以规避诉讼风险。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Court of Appeal overturned a Competition Appeal Tribunal ruling, holding that Deckers did not breach competition law by preventing an authorised retailer from selling on an unbranded discount website. The judgment confirms that restrictions on online channels within selective distribution systems are not automatically illegal. Instead, they require a careful assessment of legal and economic context to establish a sufficient degree of harm, aligning with established case law such as Coty. While this clarifies the treatment of channel restrictions, it does not signal leniency towards hard...
core_points_zh: 在线销售限制非自动违法，需个案评估法律经济背景及损害程度
上诉法院推翻初审判决，支持品牌方管控未品牌折扣渠道的合规性
企业应避免价格固定等核心限制，通过透明标准降低反垄断诉讼风险
core_points_en: Restrictions on online sales channels in selective distribution are not presumed illegal but require contextual analysis of harm.
The Court of Appeal ruled that banning sales on unbranded discount websites by authorised retailers does not inherently breach competition law.
Hardcore restrictions such as resale price maintenance and blanket online bans remain strictly prohibited under current enforcement standards.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国出口欧洲的品牌商需警惕选择性分销中的在线限制合规性。建议避免直接禁止线上销售或固定价格，转而制定基于品牌形象和防止搭便车的客观准入标准。完善合同条款与证据留存，可有效应对潜在的反垄断调查与民事诉讼，保障供应链稳定。
report_items.insight_en: This decision provides important clarity for brands operating selective distribution networks in the UK and EU. It reinforces that channel architecture controls can be lawful if justified by brand positioning or network integrity, rather than being treated as per se violations. However, rights holders must distinguish these legitimate quality controls from hardcore anti-competitive practices. Maintaining transparent...
insight_points_zh: 制定基于品牌定位的客观分销标准，避免 blanket ban 线上销售
严禁转售价格维持等核心限制，完善合规文档以应对反垄断审查
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands can defend channel restrictions by demonstrating they protect brand image and prevent free-riding, avoiding automatic illegality findings.
Practice note: Document transparent, objective criteria for selective distribution models, specifically regarding website standards and third-party marketplace usage.
What to monitor: Continued enforcement actions against resale price maintenance and online sales restrictions by the European Commission and national competition authorities.

report_items.title_zh: 如何规划成功的知识产权调解
report_items.title_en: Strategic Planning for Successful IP Mediation Amidst New European ADR Frameworks
report_items.title: How to plan successful IP mediation
report_items.summary_zh: 文章指出调解因高效、保密及商业导向优势，成为解决IP纠纷的优选。WIPO数据显示2025年案件激增42%，中小企业占比高。欧盟层面，EUIPO扩大调解服务范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解中心。调解由中立专家主持，灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供法院无法给予的商业解决方案，有助于建立双赢局面。
report_items.summary_en: Mediation offers a confidential, cost-effective alternative to litigation for resolving intellectual property disputes, particularly benefiting SMEs and individuals. The World Intellectual Property Organization reported a 42% increase in administered cases in 2025, with significant participation from non-corporate entities. In Europe, the landscape is expanding with the EUIPO Mediation Centre extending its services to all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and designs as of June 2025. Furthermore, the Unified Patent Court will inaugurate its Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre in J...
core_points_zh: 调解具高效保密优势，WIPO案件量增42%，中小企参与度高
EUIPO扩大调解范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解仲裁中心
调解灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供超越诉讼的商业双赢方案
core_points_en: WIPO recorded a 42% rise in IP mediation cases in 2025, with SMEs and individuals comprising 59% of involved parties.
The EUIPO Mediation Centre expanded its scope in June 2025 to cover all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and registered designs.
The Unified Patent Court will launch its Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre in June 2026, enhancing European ADR options.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临IP纠纷时，应优先考虑利用EUIPO及即将成立的UPC调解机制。相比传统诉讼，调解成本更低且能保护商业秘密，尤其适合中小企业。建议提前在合同中加入调解条款，并熟悉WIPO等机构的规则，以灵活应对侵权或许可谈判，避免高昂 litigation 风险。
report_items.insight_en: The expansion of institutional mediation frameworks in Europe provides rights holders with structured avenues to resolve cross-border IP conflicts efficiently. For portfolio managers and legal teams, integrating these mechanisms can facilitate commercially focused settlements that courts may not offer. Understanding the procedural nuances of WIPO, EUIPO, and upcoming UPC facilities allows parties to leverage confiden...
insight_points_zh: 优先利用EUIPO及UPC调解机制降低在欧维权成本与风险
建议在合同中预设调解条款，灵活运用ADR解决跨境IP争议
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Institutional mediation offers confidential, commercially oriented resolutions for IP disputes, reducing reliance on public litigation.
Practice note: Consider incorporating mandatory mediation clauses in commercial agreements to utilize EUIPO and future UPC dispute resolution services.
What to monitor: Track the operational rollout of the UPC Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre scheduled for June 2026.

report_items.title_zh: 瑞士通过专利法修订引入实质审查制度
report_items.title_en: Switzerland Reforms Patent Act with Mandatory Searches and Optional Substantive Examination
report_items.title: Switzerland introduces substantive examinations with Patent Act reform
report_items.summary_zh: 2024年3月，瑞士联邦议会通过《专利法》部分修订案。此次改革核心在于引入强制性的现有技术检索，并允许申请人选择是否进行全面的实质审查。此外，新规接受英文技术文件，并建立了新的上诉系统。这一变革标志着瑞士从形式审查向更严格的审查模式转变，旨在提升专利质量与法律确定性，对在该国进行专利布局的企业将产生深远影响。
report_items.summary_en: In March 2024, the Swiss Federal Assembly passed a partial revision of the Patent Act, introducing significant procedural changes. Key amendments include the implementation of a mandatory prior-art search and an optional full substantive examination system. The reform also allows for the acceptance of English-language technical documents and establishes a new appeal mechanism. These measures mark a shift towards enhanced patent quality and legal certainty within the Swiss jurisdiction.
core_points_zh: 瑞士联邦议会于2024年3月通过《专利法》部分修订案
引入强制性现有技术检索及可选的全面实质审查机制
接受英文技术文档并建立全新的专利上诉系统
core_points_en: The revised Swiss Patent Act introduces a mandatory prior-art search requirement for all patent applications filed in Switzerland.
Applicants may now opt for a full substantive examination, moving beyond the previous formal examination framework.
The reform permits the submission of English-language technical documents and implements a new appellate structure.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业赴瑞士申请专利需适应新流程，强制检索可能增加前期成本与时间。建议提前规划现有技术分析，利用英文文件便利降低翻译成本。同时，关注实质审查的可选性，根据商业价值权衡投入，以应对更高的授权门槛和潜在的驳回风险。
report_items.insight_en: This legislative update alters the procedural landscape for patent registration in Switzerland. Rights holders should note the introduction of mandatory searches and the option for substantive review, which may impact prosecution timelines and grant probabilities. The acceptance of English documentation offers potential administrative efficiencies for international applicants managing European portfolios.
insight_points_zh: 适应强制检索要求，优化前期现有技术分析与预算规划
善用英文文件政策降低成本，审慎评估实质审查的商业必要性
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor how the optional substantive examination affects grant rates and portfolio strength in the Swiss market.
Practice note: Leverage the new allowance for English-language technical documents to streamline filing procedures where applicable.
What to monitor: Track the implementation timeline and specific guidelines for the newly established appeal system.

report_items.title_zh: 华硕加入Sisvel Wi-Fi多模专利池并结束诉讼
report_items.title_en: Asus Licenses Sisvel Wi-Fi Multimode Pool SEPs, Ending Litigation with Huawei and Philips
report_items.title: Asus signs up to Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool, ending litigation
report_items.summary_zh: 华硕已就Sisvel Wi-Fi多模专利池中的标准必要专利（SEPs）获得许可。该协议结束了华硕与华为、飞利浦和Wilus之间 pending 的专利诉讼。Sisvel未披露财务条款。该专利池涵盖Wi-Fi 6和Wi-Fi 7标准的SEPs，华硕加入惠普企业、华为、松下等现有被许可人名单。
report_items.summary_en: Asus has secured a license to the standard essential patents within Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool. This agreement resolves pending patent litigation between the electronics manufacturer and key pool members, including Huawei, Philips, and Wilus. The pool encompasses SEPs relevant to Wi-Fi 6 and Wi-Fi 7 standards. By joining existing licensees such as Hewlett Packard Enterprise, Panasonic, Sony Group Corporation, and ZTE, Asus aligns with major industry participants utilizing this licensing framework. Sisvel did not disclose specific financial terms of the deal, marking another significant addi...
core_points_zh: 华硕获Sisvel Wi-Fi多模专利池许可，涵盖Wi-Fi 6/7 SEPs
协议终结华硕与Huawei、Philips及Wilus间的未决专利诉讼
Sisvel未公开许可协议的具体财务条款细节
core_points_en: Asus obtained a license for Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool SEPs covering Wi-Fi 6 and Wi-Fi 7 standards.
The licensing agreement terminates ongoing patent disputes between Asus and pool members Huawei, Philips, and Wilus.
Asus joins a growing list of major electronics manufacturers licensed under Sisvel's Wi-Fi portfolio program.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案反映Sisvel在Wi-Fi SEP领域的许可策略持续扩大，通过整合主要专利权人形成打包许可方案。对于电子制造商而言，加入此类专利池是解决多国SEP纠纷的高效路径。需关注后续其他厂商是否跟进类似和解模式，以及Wi-Fi 7 SEP许可费率的潜在变化趋势。
report_items.insight_en: This development underscores the continued consolidation of SEP licensing through established pools like Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode program. For rights holders and implementers in Europe and the US, such agreements demonstrate how patent pools serve as efficient mechanisms to resolve multi-jurisdictional SEP disputes without prolonged litigation. The inclusion of Wi-Fi 7 SEPs highlights the evolving scope of these pool...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性: 关注Wi-Fi SEP许可成本与合规风险
Practice note/实务观察: 专利池许可成为解决SEP纠纷的主流途径
What to monitor/后续观察: Sisvel专利池成员变动及费率结构更新
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor pool licensing trends for Wi-Fi 6 and 7 SEPs to assess potential compliance obligations and litigation exposure.
Practice note: Patent pools remain a primary resolution pathway for SEP disputes, offering structured access to essential technologies.
What to monitor: Observe whether other major electronics manufacturers follow Asus in joining Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool.

report_items.title: IP system must adapt to survive, say EUIPO leaders
report_items.summary_zh: 原文摘要显示，欧洲顶级知识产权官员指出，从人工智能生成内容到在线执法纠纷，现有的法律框架正面临前所未有的考验。EUIPO领导层强调IP系统必须适应这些挑战才能生存。由于正文材料仅为摘要片段，未提供具体适应措施或详细政策细节。
report_items.summary_en: Senior officials at the European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) have stated that the existing intellectual property legal framework is facing unprecedented pressure. The challenges stem primarily from the rise of artificial intelligence-generated content and complex disputes regarding online enforcement, necessitating significant adaptation for the system's continued viability.
core_points_zh: 标题与摘要显示EUIPO领导层认为IP体系需适应变化以确保持续生存
原文指出AI生成内容及在线执法纠纷使现有法律框架面临前所未有的测试
core_points_en: EUIPO leadership asserts that the current IP legal framework is being tested more severely than ever before by modern technological developments.
Key pressures on the system include the proliferation of AI-generated content and ongoing difficulties in resolving online enforcement disputes.
report_items.insight_zh: Practice note: 鉴于正文信息有限，目前仅能确认欧盟IP高层对AI和在线执法挑战的关注。后续需观察EUIPO是否发布具体的政策更新、指南或立法建议以应对上述挑战，以及这些动态对商标权利人在数字环境下的维权策略可能产生的影响。
report_items.insight_en: This commentary highlights high-level recognition within the EUIPO that current regulations may be insufficient for emerging digital realities. For rights holders and practitioners, this signals potential future shifts in policy or guidance. As specific measures are not detailed in this brief excerpt, stakeholders should track subsequent official communications for concrete regulatory responses.

report_items.title_zh: 兰博基尼揭秘保护超跑机密的设计权争夺战
report_items.title_en: Lamborghini Legal Head Addresses New Threats to Supercar Design Protection
report_items.title: Lamborghini reveals the hidden race to protect supercar secrecy
report_items.summary_zh: 原文摘要显示，兰博基尼法务负责人正应对设计保护面临的新威胁，包括间谍照片、AI生成图像以及欧盟的维修条款（repair clause）。文章主要探讨这些新兴因素对超级跑车外观设计保密性及法律保护构成的挑战。
report_items.summary_en: The head of legal at Lamborghini has highlighted emerging challenges to design protection in the automotive sector. Key concerns include the proliferation of spy shots and AI-generated images, which threaten the secrecy of new vehicle launches. Additionally, the EU's repair clause is identified as a significant legal factor impacting the scope of design rights for spare parts and visible components.
core_points_zh: 兰博基尼法务负责人指出间谍照片和AI生成图像构成设计保护新威胁
欧盟维修条款（repair clause）被视为影响外观设计保护的关键法律因素之一
core_points_en: Spy shots and AI-generated images are cited as new threats compromising supercar design secrecy.
The EU repair clause is recognized as a critical legal element affecting design protection scope.
report_items.insight_zh: 实务观察：需关注欧盟维修条款在具体司法实践中的适用边界，以及AI生成内容对现有外观设计新颖性判断标准的潜在冲击。后续应监测兰博基尼及相关车企在应对此类非传统侵权手段时的具体合规策略与诉讼动向。
report_items.insight_en: This commentary highlights the intersection of technological disruption and evolving EU design law. For rights holders, understanding how non-traditional disclosures like AI imagery interact with novelty requirements is essential. The mention of the repair clause underscores the need to monitor legislative impacts on component-level protection.
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性
Practice note/实务观察
What to monitor/后续观察
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Automotive brands must assess risks from digital leaks and AI content regarding design novelty.
Practice note: Monitor the application of the EU repair clause to determine its effect on protected spare parts.
What to monitor: Future enforcement actions or policy updates concerning AI-generated visual content and design rights.

daily_report.executive_line_en: European IP enforcement tightens as the UPC matures, the EPO excludes pure business logic from patentability, and courts clarify pharmaceutical protection and online distribution compliance.
daily_report.summary_en: The European intellectual property landscape is undergoing significant refinement in both substantive standards and enforcement mechanisms. The Unified Patent Court released its second annual review, highlighting operational maturity and the imminent launch of a dedicated mediation center, signaling a shift toward structured alternative dispute resolution. Concurrently, the European Patent Office issued a pivotal decision classifying registration-based device enablement as a non-technical administrative constraint, thereby raising the threshold for software and IoT patents by excluding pure commercial logic from technical contribution assessments. In pharmaceutical law, the Court of Justice of the European Union accepted a referral concerning the Supplementary Protection Certificate eligibility of pro-drugs, which will resolve critical uncertainties regarding portfolio extension strategies for derivative compounds. Furthermore, the UK Court of Appeal provided essential guidance on selective distribution systems, ruling that restrictions on unbranded discount websites are not automatically anti-competitive. These developments collectively demand that rights holders recalibrate paten...
what_changed_vs_last_window_en: UPC has formally entered an institutional review phase with mediation mechanisms nearing implementation.
EPO explicitly excludes pure commercial logic from inventive step assessments, raising authorization thresholds.
CJEU accepted two major cases involving pharmaceutical SPC eligibility and copyright antitrust issues.
next_watch_72h_en: Monitor the procedural timeline for the CJEU pro-drug SPC referral.
Track German DPMA enforcement actions against AI-driven bad-faith trademark applications.

Asus licensed Sisvel Wi-Fi Multimode SEPs, concluding litigation with Huawei and Philips.
Switzerland introduced mandatory prior-art searches and optional substantive examination under its revised Patent Act.
Lamborghini highlighted emerging threats to design secrecy from spy shots and AI-generated images.
business_actions_en: Optimize SEP licensing terms using new TTBER guidelines to mitigate antitrust exposure during negotiations.
Establish real-time trademark monitoring in Germany to detect and defend against AI-assisted bad-faith filings.
watchlist_en: Future EUIPO leadership statements on enforcement frameworks for AI-generated content.
Judicial application of the EU repair clause and its impact on the scope of design protection.
Cost-benefit analysis of substantive examinations under the new Swiss patent regime.
quick_takeaways_en: Patent claims must demonstrate specific technical contributions beyond administrative or commercial constraints.
Alternative dispute resolution via UPC and EUIPO mediation centers is becoming a viable strategic option.
Online distribution restrictions require contextual antitrust analysis rather than blanket prohibitions.
rising_themes_en: Technical character requirements for software patents
cooling_themes_en: Blanket online sales bans in selective distribution

Pharmaceutical portfolios require re-evaluation of SPC strategies for derivative compounds.
Brand owners can implement targeted online channel controls if justified by objective quality criteria.

weekly_report.headline_zh: UPC实务趋严，欧盟反垄断重塑许可
weekly_report.headline_en: UPC Tightens Practice; EU Antitrust Reshapes Licensing
weekly_report.executive_line: 本周UPC确立严格侵权举证标准，欧盟新指南明确SEP与版权反垄断红线，瑞士引入实质审查，欧洲IP合规与诉讼门槛全面抬升。
weekly_report.summary_zh: 本周欧洲知识产权格局呈现“司法从严、监管细化”特征。统一专利法院（UPC）通过年度回顾及杜塞尔多夫裁定，强化了对单一产品侵权比对的严格要求，提高了临时禁令获取门槛。同时，欧盟修订版TTBER生效，为专利池和FRAND许可提供清晰反垄断指引；CJEU在版权费率案中重申比例原则，打击滥用市场支配地位。此外，德国警示AI驱动的恶意商标抢注风险，瑞士专利法改革引入实质审查。企业需立即调整许可策略与证据链管理以应对合规高压。

storylines.what_happened_zh: UPC发布2025回顾并裁定临时禁令需证明单一产品全特征侵权，拒绝跨阶段组合。
storylines.why_it_matters_zh: 显著增加权利人维权难度，要求完善技术比对证据链，避免仅凭营销材料起诉。

report_items.title_zh: UPC官方2025年度回顾：五大亮点解析
report_items.title_en: UPC Annual Review 2025: Five Key Highlights from the Court's Second Official Report
report_items.title: Official UPC Year in Review – Five highlights from 2025
report_items.summary_zh: Bristows律所发布分析，解读统一专利法院（UPC）发布的2025年官方年度回顾报告。该报告是UPC的第二份年度报告，全面梳理了2025年的机构活动、案件趋势及运营发展。文章从中提炼出五个对UPC用户至关重要的亮点，旨在帮助利益相关者更好地理解UPC的最新动态与司法实践走向，为在欧专利诉讼策略提供参考依据。
report_items.summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) has published its second official Annual Review, detailing institutional activity, case trends, and operational developments throughout 2025. Bristows analyzes this report, extracting five specific highlights deemed most relevant for UPC users. This overview provides essential context on the court's evolving practices and statistical performance during its second full year of operation.
core_points_zh: UPC发布第二份官方年度回顾，全面展示2025年机构活动与案件趋势
报告详细分析了UPC的运营发展状况，为法律从业者提供关键数据支持
文章提炼五大核心亮点，聚焦对UPC用户最具参考价值的实务动态
core_points_en: The UPC released its second Annual Review, offering a comprehensive statistical and operational overview of the court's activities in 2025.
Bristows identifies five key highlights from the report that provide critical insights into current case trends and procedural developments.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This annual review serves as a primary reference for understanding the UPC's operational trajectory and judicial tendencies. Rights holders and legal teams should examine these highlights to align their European patent enforcement expectations with the court's actual caseload management and procedural evolution.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: The report offers data-driven insights into UPC activity levels, helping rights holders contextualize litigation timelines and court capacity.
Practice note: Legal practitioners should review the identified highlights to stay updated on emerging procedural norms and case management trends within the UPC.
What to monitor: Future updates to the UPC's annual reporting will likely continue to shape expectations regarding case volume distribution and operational efficiency.

report_items.title_zh: EPO裁定：基于注册的启用属于非技术特征
report_items.title_en: EPO Board: Registration-Based Device Enablement Is Non-Technical
report_items.title: Registration-based Enablement: Non-technical
report_items.summary_zh: 本案涉及菲利普莫里斯电热吸烟系统专利的异议程序。上诉委员会认定，设备需经互联网主机注册后方可启用的特征（特征1.7），仅反映非技术的商业或行政要求，不贡献于发明的技术特性。即便该要求导致设备运行状态发生物质变化，其底层概念的非技术性质不变。此裁决明确了在评估创造性时，纯粹由商业规则驱动的功能性限制将被排除在技术贡献之外。
report_items.summary_en: In decision T 1745/23, EPO Technical Board of Appeal 3.5.01 addressed an electrically heated smoking system by Philip Morris. The claimed invention required the device to be enabled only after registration via an Internet application on a host. The Board determined that this registration-based enablement feature constitutes a non-technical business or administrative constraint. Consequently, it does not contribute to the technical character of the invention. The Board clarified that even if implementing such a requirement causes a material change in the device’s operational state, the underlyi...
core_points_zh: 注册后启用被视为非技术商业约束，不赋予发明技术特性
实施商业规则导致的设备状态改变不改变其非技术本质
在评估创造性时，纯商业或行政要求不被视为对技术的贡献
core_points_en: Registration-based enablement is classified as a non-technical business or administrative constraint.
Material changes in device operational state do not confer technical character on administrative requirements.
Purely commercial rules driving functional limitations are excluded from technical contribution assessments.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请IoT及智能硬件专利时，应避免将单纯的商业逻辑（如付费解锁、注册激活）作为核心技术特征。撰写时需深入挖掘实现这些功能背后的具体技术改进（如通信协议优化、安全加密算法），确保权利要求聚焦于解决技术问题，以防因缺乏技术贡献而在异议或无效程序中被驳回。
report_items.insight_en: This decision reinforces the EPO's strict separation between technical features and non-technical business methods under the problem-solution approach. For IoT and smart hardware applicants, linking device functionality to administrative protocols like user registration will not support inventive step arguments. Drafting strategies must focus on specific technical implementations, such as communication protocols or s...
insight_points_zh: 避免将纯商业逻辑作为核心技术创新点申报欧洲专利
聚焦实现功能的具体技术改进以确立专利的技术贡献
insight_points_en: Client relevance: IoT and smart hardware rights holders must distinguish technical solutions from administrative access controls to secure patent protection in Europe.
Practice note: Claims should focus on specific technical improvements, such as data encryption or protocol optimization, rather than registration-based activation logic.
What to monitor: Future Board decisions applying this principle to other connected devices where software updates or user authentication drive operational states.

report_items.title_zh: CJEU裁决请求：前药是否可独立获SPC保护？
report_items.title_en: CJEU Asked to Rule on SPC Eligibility for Pro-Drugs of Previously Approved Active Ingredients
report_items.title: Pro = Active? CJEU Asked To Decide
report_items.summary_zh: 爱尔兰律所HGF分析指出，CJEU已受理案件（C-794/25），需裁定已获批活性成分的前药能否独立获得补充保护证书（SPC）。背景涉及武田制药的LDX（右旋安非他命前药）与母药DEX。尽管LDX作为新活性物质获批上市，但法规对前药是否属“同一活性物质”存疑。此裁决将澄清行业争议，解决相关诉讼，明确前药在欧盟的SPC资格标准。
report_items.summary_en: The Court of Justice of the European Union (CJEU) has received a new referral (Case C-794/25) regarding whether an approved pro-drug of a previously authorized active pharmaceutical ingredient qualifies for independent Supplementary Protection Certificate (SPC) protection. The case centers on lisdexamfetamine (LDX), a pro-drug of dexamphetamine (DEX). Although LDX was granted marketing authorization as a New Active Substance due to significant differences in safety and efficacy profiles, questions remain under Article 10.2.b of the Medicinal Products Directive. The CJEU’s ruling aims to resolv...
core_points_zh: CJEU受理前药SPC资格案，需裁定前药能否独立于母药获保护
争议焦点在于前药是否因安全性或疗效显著不同而视为新活性物质
裁决结果将消除法律不确定性，直接影响欧盟药品专利策略布局
core_points_en: The CJEU must determine if a pro-drug with distinct safety or efficacy properties can secure an SPC independently from its parent active substance.
Article 10.2.b of the Medicinal Products Directive treats derivatives as the same active substance unless they differ significantly in safety or efficacy.
The outcome will clarify SPC eligibility standards for pro-drugs like lisdexamfetamine, impacting portfolio strategies for modified pharmaceutical compounds.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This referral addresses critical uncertainty in EU pharmaceutical IP law regarding the intersection of regulatory approval status and SPC entitlement. For rights holders, the distinction between a 'New Active Substance' for regulatory purposes and an 'active ingredient' for SPC purposes is pivotal. A negative ruling could restrict SPC availability for improved formulations of older drugs, while a positive one would s...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders must evaluate whether their pro-drug portfolios rely on independent SPC protection or are vulnerable to being classified as the same active substa…
Practice note: When preparing SPC applications for derivatives, ensure robust documentation of significant differences in safety and efficacy to support arguments for distinct act…
What to monitor: Monitor the CJEU's final judgment in Case C-794/25 for definitive guidance on interpreting Article 10.2.b of the Medicinal Products Directive in the context of SP…

report_items.title_zh: 德国商标申请中的恶意注册：企业日益增长的风险
report_items.title_en: German Bad Faith Trademark Filings: DPMA Warns of Rising Strategic Abuse Risks
report_items.title: Bösgläubigkeit (bad faith) in trademark filings: A growing risk for businesses
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析德国商标法中“恶意”（Bösgläubigkeit）概念的应用与风险。德国专利商标局指出，自2025年中以来，针对未注册商标的恶意申请激增，常利用AI工具识别目标并通过电商平台施压。依据《德国商标法》，缺乏真实使用意图且旨在阻碍竞争或获取不当利益的申请将被驳回或宣告无效。该认定需综合评估申请人主观意图与客观情况，受欧盟判例影响显著。
report_items.summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) has highlighted a significant increase in potentially bad-faith trademark applications since mid-2025. These filings often target signs already used by third parties without formal protection, aiming to exert competitive pressure rather than indicate commercial origin. The DPMA attributes this trend to technological developments, such as AI tools facilitating the identification of unregistered signs, and online marketplace enforcement mechanisms that allow swift blocking of third parties. Under the German Trademark Act (MarkenG), applications file...
core_points_zh: 德国专利商标局警示恶意商标申请激增，多利用AI识别未注册标志进行策略性阻击
德国商标法规定，无真实使用意图且旨在滥用权利的注册可被驳回或在事后宣告无效
恶意认定需结合主观意图与客观环境综合评估，德国司法实践深受欧盟法院判例影响
core_points_en: DPMA reports a surge in bad-faith filings targeting unregistered signs used by third parties for strategic leverage.
AI tools and online marketplace enforcement mechanisms facilitate rapid identification and blocking of competitors.
German law excludes registration or allows invalidation of marks filed without genuine intent to use.
report_items.insight_zh: 对在欧中国企业而言，应尽早完成核心品牌在德注册以确立权利基础，避免被抢注。同时需建立主动监控机制，警惕竞争对手利用恶意注册通过电商平台快速下架产品。面对此类指控，应积极收集在先使用证据，援引德国商标法关于恶意的规定提起无效宣告请求，维护市场地位。
report_items.insight_en: This development underscores the increasing scrutiny of applicant intent in German practice, aligning with broader EU trends. Rights holders must recognize that mere registration is no longer an absolute shield against challenges based on bad faith. Proactive portfolio management is essential to mitigate risks associated with strategic filings designed to disrupt market access or extract undue advantages through enfo...
insight_points_zh: 尽早完成德国商标注册并建立监控机制，防范恶意抢注带来的电商下架风险
遭遇恶意指控时，应积极收集在先使用证据，依法提起无效宣告以维权
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Early registration remains critical to secure rights, but businesses must also prepare defenses against bad-faith challenges.
Practice note: Monitor new filings closely to identify potential bad-faith applications targeting existing unregistered signs.
What to monitor: Watch for DPMA guidance and Federal Court of Justice case law refining the definition of bad faith in digital contexts.

report_items.title_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫分院裁定：临时禁令需证明单一产品侵权
report_items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf: Single-Product Requirement and Burden of Proof in Clear Aligner Provisional Measures
report_items.title: LD Düsseldorf, May 12, 2026, Order, UPC_CFI_1747/2025
report_items.summary_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫地方法院在2026年5月12日裁决中驳回申请人临时禁令请求。法院强调，申请人须充分证明侵权行为发生的可能性大于不可能性。针对隐形牙套专利，法院认定所有技术特征必须体现在单个产品中，不同阶段的牙套不能组合认定侵权。因申请人仅依赖宣传材料且缺乏具体技术分析，未能满足举证标准，法院未审理有效性等其他抗辩理由。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Local Division in Düsseldorf dismissed a request for provisional measures in patent infringement proceedings concerning clear aligner technology. The Court held that the applicant bears the burden of proving infringement is more likely than not under Article 62 UPCA and Rule 211 RoP. Crucially, the Court construed the method claim to require all features, including opposing counter moments, to be generated by the tooth receiving cavities of a single aligner. Evidence based solely on promotional materials and speculative witness statements, without independent technical assessment of th...
core_points_zh: 申请人承担临时禁令侵权举证责任，需证明侵权可能性大于不可能性
方法权利要求的所有特征必须在单个对齐器中实现，不可跨阶段组合
仅凭宣传材料和推测性证言不足以确立复杂技术领域的侵权事实
core_points_en: Applicants bear the full burden of proof in provisional measures, requiring demonstration that infringement is more likely than not.
Method claims construed as relating to a single product require all features to be present in one appliance, not across stages.
Promotional materials and speculative assumptions are inadequate for establishing infringement in complex technical fields.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国医疗器械企业出口欧洲时，应警惕UPC对‘单一产品’特征的严格解释。在应对临时禁令指控时，需准备详尽的技术比对分析，避免仅依赖营销材料。建议提前进行FTO分析，确保多阶段治疗方案不落入同一专利的单一产品权利要求范围，以规避高额诉讼风险。
report_items.insight_en: This ruling clarifies strict evidentiary standards for preliminary relief at the UPC, particularly for multi-stage medical devices. Rights holders must provide detailed, product-specific technical analyses rather than relying on general marketing assertions. Defendants can challenge infringement allegations by highlighting the absence of feature-by-feature correspondence in individual products. The decision reinforce...
insight_points_zh: 重视UPC对单一产品特征比对的严格要求，避免跨阶段组合侵权风险
完善技术证据链，避免仅凭营销材料应对复杂的专利侵权指控
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders seeking provisional measures must secure independent technical assessments of specific accused products early in proceedings.
Practice note: Claim construction arguments should focus on whether all claimed features reside within a single physical unit or device iteration.
What to monitor: How other UPC divisions apply the 'single product' requirement to other incremental or multi-stage therapeutic technologies.

report_items.title_en: UK Court of Appeal Clarifies Online Sales Restrictions in Selective Distribution Systems
report_items.title: UK Court of Appeal issues guidance on online restrictions in selective distribution systems
report_items.summary_zh: 英国上诉法院在Deckers诉Up & Running案中裁定，品牌方禁止授权零售商在未品牌折扣网站销售不违反竞争法，推翻竞争上诉法庭原判。法院确认此类在线限制需结合法律与经济背景评估损害程度，而非自动违法。此举虽未放松对转售价格维持等核心限制的执法，但强调品牌应建立透明、客观的分销标准以规避诉讼风险。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Court of Appeal overturned a Competition Appeal Tribunal ruling, holding that Deckers did not breach competition law by preventing an authorised retailer from selling on an unbranded discount website. The judgment confirms that restrictions on online channels within selective distribution systems are not automatically illegal. Instead, they require a careful assessment of legal and economic context to establish a sufficient degree of harm, aligning with established case law such as Coty. While this clarifies the treatment of channel restrictions, it does not signal leniency towards hard...
core_points_zh: 在线销售限制非自动违法，需个案评估法律经济背景及损害程度
上诉法院推翻初审判决，支持品牌方管控未品牌折扣渠道的合规性
企业应避免价格固定等核心限制，通过透明标准降低反垄断诉讼风险
core_points_en: Restrictions on online sales channels in selective distribution are not presumed illegal but require contextual analysis of harm.
The Court of Appeal ruled that banning sales on unbranded discount websites by authorised retailers does not inherently breach competition law.
Hardcore restrictions such as resale price maintenance and blanket online bans remain strictly prohibited under current enforcement standards.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国出口欧洲的品牌商需警惕选择性分销中的在线限制合规性。建议避免直接禁止线上销售或固定价格，转而制定基于品牌形象和防止搭便车的客观准入标准。完善合同条款与证据留存，可有效应对潜在的反垄断调查与民事诉讼，保障供应链稳定。
report_items.insight_en: This decision provides important clarity for brands operating selective distribution networks in the UK and EU. It reinforces that channel architecture controls can be lawful if justified by brand positioning or network integrity, rather than being treated as per se violations. However, rights holders must distinguish these legitimate quality controls from hardcore anti-competitive practices. Maintaining transparent...
insight_points_zh: 制定基于品牌定位的客观分销标准，避免 blanket ban 线上销售
严禁转售价格维持等核心限制，完善合规文档以应对反垄断审查
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands can defend channel restrictions by demonstrating they protect brand image and prevent free-riding, avoiding automatic illegality findings.
Practice note: Document transparent, objective criteria for selective distribution models, specifically regarding website standards and third-party marketplace usage.
What to monitor: Continued enforcement actions against resale price maintenance and online sales restrictions by the European Commission and national competition authorities.

report_items.title_zh: 如何规划成功的知识产权调解
report_items.title_en: Strategic Planning for Successful IP Mediation Amidst New European ADR Frameworks
report_items.title: How to plan successful IP mediation
report_items.summary_zh: 文章指出调解因高效、保密及商业导向优势，成为解决IP纠纷的优选。WIPO数据显示2025年案件激增42%，中小企业占比高。欧盟层面，EUIPO扩大调解服务范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解中心。调解由中立专家主持，灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供法院无法给予的商业解决方案，有助于建立双赢局面。
report_items.summary_en: Mediation offers a confidential, cost-effective alternative to litigation for resolving intellectual property disputes, particularly benefiting SMEs and individuals. The World Intellectual Property Organization reported a 42% increase in administered cases in 2025, with significant participation from non-corporate entities. In Europe, the landscape is expanding with the EUIPO Mediation Centre extending its services to all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and designs as of June 2025. Furthermore, the Unified Patent Court will inaugurate its Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre in J...
core_points_zh: 调解具高效保密优势，WIPO案件量增42%，中小企参与度高
EUIPO扩大调解范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解仲裁中心
调解灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供超越诉讼的商业双赢方案
core_points_en: WIPO recorded a 42% rise in IP mediation cases in 2025, with SMEs and individuals comprising 59% of involved parties.
The EUIPO Mediation Centre expanded its scope in June 2025 to cover all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and registered designs.
The Unified Patent Court will launch its Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre in June 2026, enhancing European ADR options.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临IP纠纷时，应优先考虑利用EUIPO及即将成立的UPC调解机制。相比传统诉讼，调解成本更低且能保护商业秘密，尤其适合中小企业。建议提前在合同中加入调解条款，并熟悉WIPO等机构的规则，以灵活应对侵权或许可谈判，避免高昂 litigation 风险。
report_items.insight_en: The expansion of institutional mediation frameworks in Europe provides rights holders with structured avenues to resolve cross-border IP conflicts efficiently. For portfolio managers and legal teams, integrating these mechanisms can facilitate commercially focused settlements that courts may not offer. Understanding the procedural nuances of WIPO, EUIPO, and upcoming UPC facilities allows parties to leverage confiden...
insight_points_zh: 优先利用EUIPO及UPC调解机制降低在欧维权成本与风险
建议在合同中预设调解条款，灵活运用ADR解决跨境IP争议
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Institutional mediation offers confidential, commercially oriented resolutions for IP disputes, reducing reliance on public litigation.
Practice note: Consider incorporating mandatory mediation clauses in commercial agreements to utilize EUIPO and future UPC dispute resolution services.
What to monitor: Track the operational rollout of the UPC Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre scheduled for June 2026.

report_items.title_zh: 瑞士通过专利法修订引入实质审查制度
report_items.title_en: Switzerland Reforms Patent Act with Mandatory Searches and Optional Substantive Examination
report_items.title: Switzerland introduces substantive examinations with Patent Act reform
report_items.summary_zh: 2024年3月，瑞士联邦议会通过《专利法》部分修订案。此次改革核心在于引入强制性的现有技术检索，并允许申请人选择是否进行全面的实质审查。此外，新规接受英文技术文件，并建立了新的上诉系统。这一变革标志着瑞士从形式审查向更严格的审查模式转变，旨在提升专利质量与法律确定性，对在该国进行专利布局的企业将产生深远影响。
report_items.summary_en: In March 2024, the Swiss Federal Assembly passed a partial revision of the Patent Act, introducing significant procedural changes. Key amendments include the implementation of a mandatory prior-art search and an optional full substantive examination system. The reform also allows for the acceptance of English-language technical documents and establishes a new appeal mechanism. These measures mark a shift towards enhanced patent quality and legal certainty within the Swiss jurisdiction.
core_points_zh: 瑞士联邦议会于2024年3月通过《专利法》部分修订案
引入强制性现有技术检索及可选的全面实质审查机制
接受英文技术文档并建立全新的专利上诉系统
core_points_en: The revised Swiss Patent Act introduces a mandatory prior-art search requirement for all patent applications filed in Switzerland.
Applicants may now opt for a full substantive examination, moving beyond the previous formal examination framework.
The reform permits the submission of English-language technical documents and implements a new appellate structure.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业赴瑞士申请专利需适应新流程，强制检索可能增加前期成本与时间。建议提前规划现有技术分析，利用英文文件便利降低翻译成本。同时，关注实质审查的可选性，根据商业价值权衡投入，以应对更高的授权门槛和潜在的驳回风险。
report_items.insight_en: This legislative update alters the procedural landscape for patent registration in Switzerland. Rights holders should note the introduction of mandatory searches and the option for substantive review, which may impact prosecution timelines and grant probabilities. The acceptance of English documentation offers potential administrative efficiencies for international applicants managing European portfolios.
insight_points_zh: 适应强制检索要求，优化前期现有技术分析与预算规划
善用英文文件政策降低成本，审慎评估实质审查的商业必要性
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor how the optional substantive examination affects grant rates and portfolio strength in the Swiss market.
Practice note: Leverage the new allowance for English-language technical documents to streamline filing procedures where applicable.
What to monitor: Track the implementation timeline and specific guidelines for the newly established appeal system.

report_items.summary_en: Asus has secured a license to the standard essential patents within Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool. This agreement resolves pending patent litigation between the electronics manufacturer and key pool members, including Huawei, Philips, and Wilus. The pool encompasses SEPs relevant to Wi-Fi 6 and Wi-Fi 7 standards. By joining existing licensees such as Hewlett Packard Enterprise, Panasonic, Sony Group Corporation, and ZTE, Asus aligns with major industry participants utilizing this licensing framework. Sisvel did not disclose specific financial terms of the deal, marking another significant addi...
core_points_zh: 华硕获Sisvel Wi-Fi多模专利池许可，涵盖Wi-Fi 6/7 SEPs
协议终结华硕与Huawei、Philips及Wilus间的未决专利诉讼
Sisvel未公开许可协议的具体财务条款细节
core_points_en: Asus obtained a license for Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool SEPs covering Wi-Fi 6 and Wi-Fi 7 standards.
The licensing agreement terminates ongoing patent disputes between Asus and pool members Huawei, Philips, and Wilus.
Asus joins a growing list of major electronics manufacturers licensed under Sisvel's Wi-Fi portfolio program.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案反映Sisvel在Wi-Fi SEP领域的许可策略持续扩大，通过整合主要专利权人形成打包许可方案。对于电子制造商而言，加入此类专利池是解决多国SEP纠纷的高效路径。需关注后续其他厂商是否跟进类似和解模式，以及Wi-Fi 7 SEP许可费率的潜在变化趋势。
report_items.insight_en: This development underscores the continued consolidation of SEP licensing through established pools like Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode program. For rights holders and implementers in Europe and the US, such agreements demonstrate how patent pools serve as efficient mechanisms to resolve multi-jurisdictional SEP disputes without prolonged litigation. The inclusion of Wi-Fi 7 SEPs highlights the evolving scope of these pool...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性: 关注Wi-Fi SEP许可成本与合规风险
Practice note/实务观察: 专利池许可成为解决SEP纠纷的主流途径
What to monitor/后续观察: Sisvel专利池成员变动及费率结构更新
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor pool licensing trends for Wi-Fi 6 and 7 SEPs to assess potential compliance obligations and litigation exposure.
Practice note: Patent pools remain a primary resolution pathway for SEP disputes, offering structured access to essential technologies.
What to monitor: Observe whether other major electronics manufacturers follow Asus in joining Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool.

report_items.title: IP system must adapt to survive, say EUIPO leaders
report_items.summary_zh: 原文摘要显示，欧洲顶级知识产权官员指出，从人工智能生成内容到在线执法纠纷，现有的法律框架正面临前所未有的考验。EUIPO领导层强调IP系统必须适应这些挑战才能生存。由于正文材料仅为摘要片段，未提供具体适应措施或详细政策细节。
report_items.summary_en: Senior officials at the European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) have stated that the existing intellectual property legal framework is facing unprecedented pressure. The challenges stem primarily from the rise of artificial intelligence-generated content and complex disputes regarding online enforcement, necessitating significant adaptation for the system's continued viability.

core_points_en: EUIPO leadership asserts that the current IP legal framework is being tested more severely than ever before by modern technological developments.
Key pressures on the system include the proliferation of AI-generated content and ongoing difficulties in resolving online enforcement disputes.

For rights holders and practitioners, this signals potential future shifts in policy or guidance. As specific measures are not detailed in this brief excerpt, stakeholders should track subsequent official communications for concrete regulatory responses.

transcript_lines_en: Today is May 24, 2026. Here are the most relevant European IP developments in today's briefing.

First, The UPC released its second Annual Review, offering a comprehensive statistical and operational overview of the court's. Why it matters: The report offers data-driven insights into UPC activity levels, helping rights holders contextualize litigation timelines and court ca.

Next, Registration-based enablement is classified as a non-technical business or administrative constraint. Why it matters: IoT and smart hardware rights holders must distinguish technical solutions from administrative access controls to secure patent protect.

Next, The CJEU must determine if a pro-drug with distinct safety or efficacy properties can secure an SPC independently from i. Why it matters: Rights holders must evaluate whether their pro-drug portfolios rely on independent SPC protection or are vulnerable to being classified.

Finally, DPMA reports a surge in bad-faith filings targeting unregistered signs used by third parties for strategic leverage. Why it matters: Early registration remains critical to secure rights, but businesses must also prepare defenses against bad-faith challenges.
Overall, today's European IP signals center on Patents, Trade marks, General IP. The next point to watch is Future EUIPO leadership statements on enforcement frameworks for AI-generated content.

Today is May 24, 2026. Here are the most relevant European IP developments in today's briefing.
First, The UPC released its second Annual Review, offering a comprehensive statistical and operational overview of the court's. Why it matters: The report offers data-driven insights into UPC activity levels, helping rights holders contextualize litigation timelines and court ca.
Next, Registration-based enablement is classified as a non-technical business or administrative constraint. Why it matters: IoT and smart hardware rights holders must distinguish technical solutions from administrative access controls to secure patent protect.

topics.headline_en: UPC Case Law Maturation and PMAC Mediation Launch
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，UPC通过年报及新程序规则展现高效透明。PMAC调解机制上线，为SEP纠纷提供ADR新路径。司法实践上，等同原则、功能性限定及临时禁令标准趋于严格，强调单一产品比对与程序合规。企业需警惕官网声明风险，利用撤诉规则优化成本，并建立严格的期限管理机制以应对日益成熟的欧洲专利诉讼环境。
key_points: PMAC程序规则获批且系统上线，为单一专利及SEP/FRAND纠纷提供官方调解与仲裁渠道，降低维权成本。
司法裁判趋严：等同判定具累积性，临时禁令要求证明单一产品侵权，功能性限定可能扩大直接侵权范围。
程序合规至关重要：上诉期自附理由判决日起算，登录系统不视为应诉，但逾期或违规将导致权利丧失。
actions: 评估引入PMAC调解机制处理潜在SEP纠纷，同时核查专利在参与国的公约状态以确保单一效力。
优化对欧出口硬件的权利要求排查，避免功能性描述陷阱；慎用官网合法性声明以防强制公示判决。
建立UPC诉讼期限双重核查机制，善用“可原谅错误”条款救济，并在上诉阶段灵活利用撤诉规则和解。
watchlist: 关注赫尔辛基、杜塞尔多夫等核心分院在等同原则与权利要求解释上的早期判例固化趋势。
监测行政委员会后续是否就PMAC运作及诉讼费退还等新规出台更明确的配套执行口径。
追踪UPC在FRAND许可意愿认定及暂停执行效力（如保证金门槛）方面的具体裁量标准变化。
topics.summary_en: During the first half of 2026, the Unified Patent Court demonstrated increased operational efficiency through its annual report and new procedural frameworks. The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre officially launched its case management system, providing a structured alternative dispute resolution pathway for standard-essential patent and cross-border conflicts. Judicial practice has become more rigorous regarding equivalence doctrines, functional claim limitations, and provisional measure standards. Courts emphasize single-product infringement analysis and strict procedural compliance. Rights holders must carefully manage public statements to avoid adverse evidentiary consequences and utilize withdrawal mechanisms to optimize litigation costs. Establishing robust deadline management systems is essential to navigate this evolving enforcement landscape effectively.
key_points_en: The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre adopted procedural rules and launched its digital platform, offering mediation and arbitration services for European and Unitary Patent...
Judicial standards are tightening: equivalence findings require cumulative criteria satisfaction, provisional measures demand proof of single-product infringement, and broad functi...
Procedural compliance is critical: appeal periods commence from the reasoned judgment date, passive system access does not constitute entering an appearance, and failures to meet d...
actions_en: Evaluate the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre for resolving potential SEP disputes and verify that patents cover all participating member states to ensure valid unitary effe...
Review export hardware claims to avoid pitfalls associated with functional descriptions and exercise caution regarding website legality statements to prevent mandatory publication...
Implement dual verification for UPC litigation deadlines, leverage 'excusable error' provisions for relief where appropriate, and strategically use withdrawal rules during appeals...
watchlist_en: Monitor early precedent consolidation in core divisions such as Helsinki and Düsseldorf regarding equivalence principles and claim construction methodologies.
Track whether the Administrative Committee issues further guidance on Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre operations and fee reimbursement procedures.
Observe developments in FRAND willingness assessments and specific discretionary standards for suspending enforcement effects, including security deposit thresholds.

topics.headline_zh: 欧洲SEP：UPC禁令与全球费率博弈
topics.headline_en: UPC Injunctions, Global FRAND Rates, and Evolving SEP Enforcement
topics.summary_zh: 2025-2026年，欧洲SEP格局剧变。UPC强化禁令效力并签发反禁诉令，英国法院确立高额全球FRAND费率先例，仲裁成为新趋势。NPE利用UPC加剧诉讼，中美欧监管分歧显现。中国车企加速加入Avanci等专利池以规避风险，但需警惕管辖权冲突及合规成本上升。
key_points: UPC强化执法：频繁签发临时禁令及针对中国法院的反禁诉令(AASI)，NPE活跃度激增。
费率裁定全球化：英国法院确立数亿美元级交叉许可FRAND费率，仲裁条款效力获认可。
许可模式转型：汽车/消费电子领域加速向Avanci/Sisvel等专利池集中，监管框架(如TTBER)更新。
actions: 收到侵权通知须立即书面表达许可意愿，避免丧失FRAND抗辩权。
评估加入主流专利池(如Avanci)的成本效益，优先通过谈判而非诉讼解决纠纷。
审查现有许可协议以符合新版TTBER反垄断要求，建立跨法域诉讼预警机制。
watchlist: 英国最高法院关于全球FRAND管辖权的最终裁决及其对UPC的影响。
UKIPO及欧盟关于SEP透明度与必要性审查的监管改革细则落地情况。
中美欧在SEP救济措施及反垄断立场上的进一步分化与协调动态。

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.summary_en: The standard-essential patent landscape is undergoing significant transformation through 2026. The Unified Patent Court has strengthened enforcement mechanisms, frequently issuing interim injunctions and anti-anti-suit injunctions to protect proceedings from foreign interference. Concurrently, UK courts have established precedents for determining global cross-license FRAND rates, while arbitration clauses gain judicial recognition as viable dispute resolution tools. Non-practicing entities are increasingly leveraging the UPC platform to escalate licensing pressures across Europe. Regulatory divergence is evident, with US antitrust scrutiny contrasting with EU frameworks. Implementers face rising compliance costs and jurisdictional conflicts, prompting a strategic shift toward major patent pools like Avanci. Stakeholders must navigate these complex dynamics by prioritizing substantive neg...
key_points_en: UPC enforcement intensifies with frequent interim injunctions and anti-anti-suit orders, driving increased activity by non-practicing entities seeking leverage.
Global rate determination advances as UK courts set high-value cross-license FRAND precedents, while arbitration gains validity as an alternative resolution mechanism.
Licensing models consolidate around major patent pools in automotive and consumer electronics sectors, driven by regulatory updates and risk mitigation needs.
actions_en: Immediately express written willingness to license upon receiving infringement notices to preserve FRAND defense rights and avoid injunction risks.
Evaluate cost-benefit ratios of joining established patent pools such as Avanci, prioritizing negotiated settlements over protracted litigation.
Review existing agreements for compliance with updated competition rules like TTBER and establish cross-jurisdictional monitoring systems for emerging legal threats.
watchlist_en: Final rulings on global FRAND jurisdiction and their operational impact on Unified Patent Court procedures and national court interactions.
Implementation details of regulatory reforms concerning SEP transparency and essentiality reviews by UKIPO and EU authorities.
Divergence and coordination efforts between US, Chinese, and European regulators regarding SEP remedies, antitrust enforcement, and licensing practices.

topics.headline_zh: 欧盟商标司法趋严与融资新政
topics.headline_en: EUIPO Tightens Trademark Standards While Launching SME Financing Support
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，EUIPO及欧盟法院强化商标保护标准。司法端，CJEU明确异议权利需全程有效，普通法院撤销武器类“Obelix”商标，强调声誉全局评估；实务端，德国警示AI恶意抢注风险，动态商标因技术功能被驳回。政策端，EUIPO推出中小企业基金降低注册成本，并发布报告推动IP融资释放5800亿欧元创新资金。企业需应对合规挑战并把握融资红利。
key_points: 司法口径收紧：CJEU裁定异议期间在先权利须持续有效，普通法院在“Obelix”案中强调对商标声誉及关联性的全局评估，提高无效宣告门槛。
注册风险升级：德国警示利用AI进行的恶意抢注激增，纯技术功能的动态商标被认定缺乏显著性而遭驳回，企业需防范电商下架风险。
政策利好释放：EUIPO启动2026中小企业基金补贴申请费用，并发布IP融资报告建议释放5800亿欧元创新资金，降低市场进入与融资门槛。
actions: 建立权利动态监控机制，确保异议或诉讼期间在先商标持续有效且合规使用，避免因权利灭失导致维权失败。
尽早完成核心市场（如德国）商标注册以防范AI恶意抢注，同时优化非传统商标（如动态标）设计，避免仅展示技术功能。
积极申请EUIPO中小企业基金以降低欧盟商标布局成本，并规范知识产权管理，探索利用IP资产抵押获取创新融资。
watchlist: 关注欧洲层面是否就“Obelix”案等裁判给出更明确的声誉评估配套指引。
监测EUIPO针对AI生成内容及在线执法纠纷的法律框架适应性调整动向。
追踪欧盟IP融资政策落地细节及手工艺地理标志简化程序的后续扩展情况。
topics.summary_en: During the first half of 2026, the European Union Intellectual Property Office and EU courts reinforced trademark protection standards. Judicially, the Court of Justice clarified that earlier rights must remain valid throughout opposition proceedings, while the General Court annulled a refusal to invalidate the Obelix mark for weapons, emphasizing comprehensive reputation assessment. Practically, German authorities warned of increased bad-faith filings facilitated by AI, and motion marks depicting purely technical functions were rejected for lacking distinctiveness. Policy-wise, the EUIPO launched the 2026 SME Fund to subsidize registration costs and released a report proposing measures to unlock €580 billion in IP-backed financing. Companies must navigate these stricter compliance requirements while leveraging new financial incentives to optimize their intellectual property strategies a...
key_points_en: Judicial scrutiny intensified as the CJEU ruled that earlier rights must remain valid at the time of the final EUIPO decision, and the General Court mandated a holistic assessment...
Registration risks escalated due to a surge in bad-faith applications targeting unregistered signs, aided by AI tools, and the rejection of motion marks that solely demonstrate tec...
Policy support expanded with the EUIPO SME Fund 2026 offering fee reimbursements for national and EU trademarks, alongside a strategic report recommending structural changes to fac...
actions_en: Implement dynamic monitoring of prior rights to ensure continuous validity and use during opposition or litigation, preventing loss of standing due to lapse or expiration before fi...
Secure early trademark registrations in key jurisdictions to counter AI-driven bad-faith squatting, and redesign motion marks to include distinctive, non-functional visual elements...
Apply for EUIPO SME Fund subsidies to reduce filing costs, and prepare internal IP valuation frameworks to explore collateralized financing opportunities aligned with emerging EU p...
watchlist_en: Monitor for further judicial guidance on reputation assessment criteria following the Obelix ruling and similar high-profile invalidity cases.
Track EUIPO and national office adaptations to legal frameworks addressing AI-generated content and online enforcement disputes.
Follow the implementation details of EU IP financing policies and the expansion of simplified procedures for artisanal geographical indications.

topics.headline_en: UKIPO Warns of Risks from Counterfeit Ink and Toner Cartridges
topics.summary_zh: 2026年3月，英国知识产权局（UKIPO）发布警示，指出全球假冒贸易达4670亿美元且常关联有组织犯罪。假冒碳粉不仅造成严重设备损坏，造假者往往免责且不赔偿。该事件凸显了知识产权执法在耗材领域的严峻性，强调建立合规溯源体系及加强供应商尽调对于防范供应链指控和保障品牌安全至关重要。
key_points: 全球假冒贸易规模巨大且关联有组织犯罪网络
假冒耗材致损严重但造假者常免责不赔偿
需强化防伪保护以应对供应链合规风险
actions: 出口企业应建立全流程合规溯源体系
进口商需加强对供应商的尽职调查
避免采购来源不明或价格异常的低价耗材
watchlist: 欧盟及英国对假冒耗材执法力度的变化
针对打印机耗材品牌的新型侵权手段
国际组织犯罪网络在假冒贸易中的新动向
topics.topic_name_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护
topics.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has issued a warning regarding the significant risks associated with counterfeit ink and toner cartridges, particularly affecting small businesses. Citing an OECD and EUIPO report, the agency estimates global counterfeiting trade at USD 467 billion, noting strong links to organized crime networks. The blog emphasizes that online marketplaces frequently facilitate the sale of fake goods through third-party sellers. Counterfeit print consumables can cause serious operational issues and equipment damage, yet manufacturers typically bear no liability for these resulting damages. This highlights the critical need for robust procurement systems to prevent infiltration of fake products into supply chains. Businesses are advised to review their sourcing practices to mitigate financial and operational risks associated with non-genuine consumables.
key_points_en: Global counterfeit trade is valued at approximately USD 467 billion with established links to organized crime networks.
Counterfeit print consumables cause serious operational issues and lack manufacturer liability for resulting damages.
Online third-party sellers frequently offer counterfeit goods, requiring robust procurement systems to prevent infiltration.
actions_en: Review procurement contracts to ensure supplier warranties explicitly cover equipment damage caused by defective consumables.
Implement visual and functional verification steps for high-volume consumable purchases to distinguish genuine from fake items.
Conduct enhanced due diligence on suppliers and avoid sourcing materials from unverified or suspiciously low-cost channels.
watchlist_en: Changes in enforcement intensity regarding counterfeit consumables within the EU and UK jurisdictions.
Emerging infringement methods targeting printer consumable brands and distribution channels.
New trends and tactics employed by international organized crime networks in the global counterfeit trade.
